title: Generic Multitools
description: adds paxels for wood, stone and iron, the rest will be added soon
body:
adds

-wooden paxel

    makes entities struck by it hungry for 2 seconds.

-stone paxel

    makes entities struck by it slow for 5 seconds.

-iron paxel

    has a chance to give the player a small amount of the haste effect.

-golden paxel 

    when an entity is attacked by this tool they get the weakness effect for 4 seconds

-diamond paxel

    every 10 hits against an entity spawns lightning!!
